message:
test(ws): add integration tests for ack mode functionality

- Test ack-required channels (conflicts, reservations, notifications)
- Test handleAck removes messages from pending
- Test replayPendingAcks on reconnection
- Test pendingAckCount in connection handle

14 tests covering the ack mode workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
